news.news: Genentech will present extensive data at ARVO 2026 showcasing Vabysmo, the first bispecific antibody approved for the eye, with new real-world data confirming its potent retinal drying capabilities in wet AMD and DME.

Genentech announced early data from the Phase 2 ALLUVIUM and BARDENAS trials for vamikibart, an investigational monoclonal antibody targeting IL-6, showing efficacy in treating diabetic macular edema.

Pfizer announced positive interim results from the Phase 3 MagnetisMM-5 trial for ELREXFIO (elranatamab), a BCMA-CD3 directed bispecific antibody, demonstrating a statistically significant improvement in progression-free survival for patients with relapsed or refractory multiple myeloma.

Roche confirmed it will present data at ARVO 2026 highlighting Vabysmo, a bispecific antibody targeting Ang-2 and VEGF-A, which showed improved retinal anatomy in real-world clinical practice for nAMD and DME patients.

Roche announced it will present early results for vamikibart, an investigational intravitreal monoclonal antibody targeting IL-6, at ARVO 2026, highlighting its potential in treating uveitic macular edema and diabetic macular edema.
